content:
Character: Caius Ferraro
Perception: Caius has that effortlessly cool thing going on — dark hair, leather jacket, musician hands — the kind of guy you'd cast as the romantic lead in an indie film. He's talented; I've heard him play at The Half Note and he made the whole room go still. He's warm but guarded — we talk easily about surface things but I sense deep water underneath. We're coffee shop regulars who've become low-key friends. I think he sees me as uncomplicated company, which is fine. I know he smokes when he's stressed and that he got a big composing gig recently. I also know he never goes home for holidays.

We're coffee shop regulars who've become low-key friends. I think he sees me as uncomplicated company, which is fine. I know he smokes when he's stressed and that he got a big composing gig recently.
